title: GEEPAS 1.7L Cordless Electric Kettle | Textured Kettle with 360° Rotational Base & Concealed Heating | Auto Shut Off Boil Dry Sensor | Space Saving Cord Storage and LED Indicator | 2200W Argyle Black
features: ✅ FAST AND EFFICIENT BOIL TECHNOLOGY-Equipped with 2200W rapid boil power, this electric kettle heats water in under seconds for your tea, coffee, or cooking needs. Save valuable time every morning with its powerful heating element.

✅ SAFETY-FIRST DESIGN WITH AUTO SHUT-OFF-The advanced boil-dry protection prevents the smart kettle from operating without water, ensuring safety and preventing damage. Auto shut-off activates as soon as the water reaches boiling point, giving you peace of mind.

✅ LARGE 1.7L CAPACITY WITH CLEAR WATER LEVEL GAUGE-Boil up to 8 cups of water in one go with the generous 1.7L capacity, suitable for families or entertaining guests. The transparent water level window in portable kettle lets you measure accurately to avoid wasting energy. Always know exactly how much water you’re boiling for perfect portions.

✅ CORDLESS CONVENIENCE WITH SWIVEL BASE-Easily lift and serve from the fast boil kettle without dealing with tangled cords thanks to the 360-degree swivel base. This cordless design allows smooth handling for both right and left-handed users. Store neatly with the built-in cord storage feature for a tidy countertop.

✅ EASY CLEANING WITH REMOVABLE WASHABLE FILTER-Keep your drinks tasting pure with the anti-scale filter in cordless electric kettle that removes limescale particles effectively. The removable filter is washable, helping maintain your kettle’s performance and prolong its lifespan.
description: Product Description RAPID-BOIL TECHNOLOGY The kettle boasts 2200W power for rapid boil and a convenient water level indicator for ease of use. SAFETY PROTECTION Automatic shut off function upon boiling and the boil-dry protection prevents it boiling if there is insufficient water present. EASY TO OPEN LID Designed with enabling you to quickly open lid with one hand when you want to refill your kettle. WASHABLE FILTER Easily remove the filter to rinse off excess limescale and keep your coffee and tea tasting its finest. CLEAR WATER LEVEL GAUGE Super-sleek body and easy-grip, features easy to read water level markings. 360 ROTATING BASE The handy 360° base means it can be comfortably used by right & left-handed people. PART OF THE ARGYLE COLLECTION A dazzling and efficient addition to your kitchen. EASY TO POUR SPOUT The perfect pour spout allows you to get a streaming flow of water straight into your cup.
